what: Dimension scan of the retained capture originals (tools/snapshot-capture/.capture/img-original — git-excluded, local to the capture machine), backing ADR-0008 §11's 600px-ceiling claim.
command: for f in .capture/img-original/*; do sips -g pixelWidth -g pixelHeight "$f"; done  # aggregated: max per file
note: 1,838 originals vs 1,817 served derivatives: the difference is originals retained for releases dropped at curation/tombstoned during capture (issue #9) — kept for provenance, never served.
